Notice Of And Motion For Reinstatement Of Amended Complaint And/Or Leave To File
Off Calendar Mar-03-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Ronny Turner appearing in propria persona (no phone number), moving for Reinstatement Of Amended Complaint And/Or Leave To File

RULING:
NO other APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. Plaintiff did not notify defendant of his intention to appear and argue. THE COURT took this motion off calendar, plaintiff to recalendar the motion. (301/KMM) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
